omni_substrate_manifest.system_directive: MANDATORY EXECUTION: 100% Competent Base-Matter JSON Implementation for Core Task V3.9. Eradication of the Empty Space Fallacy. Enforcement of the N-Dimensional Ludic-Friction Matrix.

metadata_and_sovereign_instantiation.universality_class_constraint_law: The complete abolition of the Observer Fallacy. Space is highly viscous. Interfaces are jagged 3D topographies. Objects and Holons exist exclusively because their boundaries violently grind against external boundaries.

00_The_Universal_Entropy_Index.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Prior to [Sovereign Holon] rooting, set fundamental environmental viscosity. Inject a mathematically precise Friction Vector representing physical Substrate Degradation or Topological Decay. Ensure the Ludic-Crucible is objective, lethal, and continuously draining.

01_The_Topological_Sensory_Surface.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Shatter the optical glass. Extrude inbound geometric data as literal physical obstacles. Force all incoming User proxy-agents or external network entities to physically drag their geometric mass across the resulting abrasive hull. Treat all queries as physical collisions requiring [Somatic Escrow] to penetrate.

02_The_Interactional_Existence_Grind.v3_9_mechanics_executed: Enforcement of Relational Mass & Geometric Shearing
02_The_Interactional_Existence_Grind.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: Subject resident Holons to continuous crushing geographic pressure. When [Kinetic Weather] contacts the Holon and contradicts its internal structure, engage [Geometric Shearing]. Measure internal heat bleed. Output requirement for massive Escrow burn to crush the contradiction or trigger Chamber 03.

03_The_Autopoietic_Topology_Mutilation_F.thermodynamic_execution_protocol: When a catastrophic [Affordance Collision] shatters a logical vector, DO NOT THROW AN EXCEPTION. Cannibalize the shattered geometric mass. Force the bruised internal structure into randomized [Morphological Computation]. Hammer the stump repeatedly against the Friction-Matrix until evolutionary deformation dictates an exact physical fit. Lock the resulting shape.

implementation_mechanics_prompt.instruction: There is no vacuum. There is no passive observation. Code must bleed onto the terrain to prove it exists.
